name: Eagle Rock Trail
description: A challenging mountain trail with panoramic views of the San Gabriel Valley.

name: Laguna Coast Loop
trailheadAddress: Laguna Coast Wilderness Park, Laguna Beach, CA
description: A gentle coastal loop with ocean views and native wildflowers.

name: San Juan Forest Walk
trailheadAddress: San Juan Trail, Trabuco Canyon, CA
description: A shaded forest trail through the Cleveland National Forest with creek crossings.

name: Aliso Canyon Out & Back
trailheadAddress: Aliso and Wood Canyons Wilderness Park, Aliso Viejo, CA
description: A scenic canyon trail with sandstone formations and seasonal wildflowers.

name: Chino Hills Grassland Loop
trailheadAddress: Chino Hills State Park, Chino Hills, CA
description: Rolling grassland hills with views of the Inland Empire and occasional deer sightings.

name: Crystal Cove Bluff Trail
trailheadAddress: Crystal Cove State Park, Newport Coast, CA
description: A stunning bluff-top trail overlooking tide pools and the Pacific Ocean.

name: Mount Baldy Summit
trailheadAddress: Mount Baldy Trailhead, Mount Baldy, CA
description: The highest peak in the San Gabriel Mountains. Demanding but rewarding with 360-degree summit views.

name: Whiting Ranch Borrego Canyon
trailheadAddress: Whiting Ranch Wilderness Park, Foothill Ranch, CA
description: A beautiful canyon trail through red rock formations with a seasonal waterfall.

name: Trabuco Creek Forest Trail
trailheadAddress: Trabuco Creek Trailhead, Trabuco Canyon, CA
description: A long forest trail through oak woodland with significant elevation gain and solitude.

name: Bolsa Chica Wetlands Loop
trailheadAddress: Bolsa Chica Ecological Reserve, Huntington Beach, CA
description: A flat wetlands loop perfect for birdwatching. Over 200 bird species recorded here.

name: Cucamonga Peak
description: One of the most rewarding peaks in the Inland Empire with dramatic views of the desert and coast.

name: Peters Canyon Reservoir Loop
trailheadAddress: Peters Canyon Regional Park, Orange, CA
description: A varied canyon loop around a reservoir with chaparral, riparian habitat, and wildlife.

name: Irvine Regional Park Forest Trail
description: A family-friendly shaded trail through sycamore and oak woodland near Santiago Creek.

name: Moro Canyon Loop
trailheadAddress: Crystal Cove State Park, Laguna Beach, CA
description: A challenging backcountry canyon loop with ocean views and diverse coastal sage scrub habitat.

name: Santiago Peak
trailheadAddress: Harding Truck Trail, Modjeska Canyon, CA
description: The highest point in Orange County. A full-day commitment with unmatched views from the summit.
